common.tagline: 3 Hours of Fun. 5 Minutes of Planning.
common.name: Name

home.heroTitle: Plan a Complete Kids Birthday in 5 Minutes
home.heroSubtitle: Choose age, guest count, and theme - done! You get a personalized plan with schedule, games, recipes, shopping list, and invitation.
home.featuresSubtitle: A complete party plan with everything you need, automatically tailored to your child.
home.featureScheduleDesc: Automatic minute-by-minute plan for the entire party with buffer times.
home.featureGamesDesc: Age-appropriate games with instructions, matching your theme.
home.featureFoodDesc: Recipes and quantity calculations exact to your guest count.
home.featureShoppingDesc: Everything you need, sorted by category.
home.featureInvitationDesc: Print-ready invitation as PDF or WhatsApp message.
home.featureGoodieDesc: Ideas for goodie bags in three budget levels.
home.step1Desc: How old is your child turning? How many guests are coming?
home.step2Desc: Choose from 13 themes and whether the party is indoor or outdoor.
home.step3Desc: In seconds you get your complete plan with everything you need.
home.ctaSubtitle: Start the wizard now and plan the perfect kids birthday party.
home.trustedBy: For parents who would rather celebrate than plan.
home.testimonial1Text: I planned my daughter's birthday in 5 minutes. The schedule was perfect and all the kids loved the games!
home.testimonial2Text: Finally no more stress before the kids' birthday party. The shopping list alone saved me hours of planning.
home.testimonial3Text: The invitation templates are beautiful and the food quantity calculations are spot on. Absolutely recommended!

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.subtitle: Legal information according to § 5 TMG
imprint.aboutServiceText: Geburtstagspilot is a web-based application for planning children's birthday parties. The service is aimed at parents and guardians in the German-speaking region.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information about the protection of your personal data
privacy.section1Text: Data Controller as defined by the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
privacy.section2Text: This Privacy Policy applies to the website and web application Geburtstagspilot (geburtstagspilot.de). We process personal data of our users only insofar as this is necessary to provide a functional platform and our content and services.
privacy.section3Text: Processing is based on the following legal grounds:
privacy.section4Vercel: The website and web application are hosted via Vercel (Vercel Inc., San Francisco, USA). Vercel processes technically necessary connection data (IP address, timestamp, browser information). Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacy.section4Supabase: We use Supabase for database, authentication, and parts of the backend infrastructure. Authentication data, session information, and project data are processed. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.
privacy.section5Registration: During registration we collect: name, email address, and password. This data is necessary for the performance of the contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
privacy.section5Logs: Each access to our platform automatically records: IP address, date and time, page accessed, referrer URL, browser type and version. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacy.section6Text: The platform uses technically necessary cookies for session management and authentication. No tracking cookies are used. Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR.
privacy.section7Text: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.right8: Lodge a Complaint with a supervisory authority (Art. 77 GDPR)
privacy.section8Text: We employ state-of-the-art technical and organisational security measures to protect your data against accidental or intentional manipulation, loss, destruction, or access by unauthorised persons.
privacy.section9Text: We reserve the right to amend this Privacy Policy to reflect changes in the law or changes to the platform.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.subtitle: Terms of use for Geburtstagspilot
terms.section1Text: These Terms and Conditions apply to the use of the web application Geburtstagspilot, operated by WAMOCON GmbH, Mergenthalerallee 79 - 81, 65760 Eschborn.
terms.section2Text: Geburtstagspilot is an online tool for planning children's birthday parties. The service generates personalized party plans based on user input. The free plan includes up to 3 plans, the Pro plan offers extended features.
terms.section3Text: Using the free service requires registration with an email address. The generated content (game instructions, recipes) serves as suggestions and does not replace parental supervision.
terms.section4Text: The provider grants the user a simple, non-transferable right to use the platform for the duration of the contract. The user may only use the platform for personal purposes.
terms.section5Text: The user shall keep access credentials confidential and protect them from third-party access. The user shall ensure that use of the platform complies with applicable law.
terms.section6Text: WAMOCON GmbH assumes no liability for the accuracy of generated quantities, recipes, or game instructions. All activities are carried out at your own risk. The provider is fully liable for damages arising from injury to life, body, or health, as well as for intent and gross negligence.
terms.section7Text: The processing of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy and the provisions of the GDPR.
terms.section8Text: The contract is concluded for an indefinite period and may be terminated by either party with one month's notice to the end of a calendar month. The right to extraordinary termination for good cause remains unaffected.
terms.section9Text: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany applies. The place of jurisdiction is Eschborn.

handbook.title: User Manual
handbook.subtitle: Everything you need to know to get the most out of Geburtstagspilot

intro.title: Welcome to Geburtstagspilot
intro.text: Geburtstagspilot helps you plan the perfect children's birthday party in just 5 minutes. This manual explains all features step by step.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.step1Text: Register for free with your email address. You get immediate access to the party wizard and can create up to 3 plans for free.
gettingStarted.step2Text: Click 'Start Planning' and answer 7 simple questions: age, guest count, location, theme, duration, allergies, and budget.
gettingStarted.step3Text: In seconds you receive a complete party plan with schedule, games, recipes, shopping list, invitation, and goodie bag ideas.

wizard.title: The Party Wizard
wizard.text: The wizard guides you through 7 steps to the perfect party plan.
wizard.step4: Theme selection from 14 options (Pirates, Princess, Dinosaurs, and more)

plan.title: Your Party Plan
plan.text: After the wizard, you receive a comprehensive plan with the following sections:
plan.games: 5 age-appropriate games with instructions and material lists
plan.food: Recipes and quantity calculations exact to your guest count
plan.goodies: Goodie bag ideas in three budget levels

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.text: In the dashboard you find all your saved party plans. You can:

sharing.title: Sharing Plans
sharing.text: Share your party plans with other parents or helpers:
sharing.step3: Copy the generated link or share via WhatsApp

pro.title: Pro Features
pro.text: With the Pro plan (1.99 EUR/month) you unlock additional features:
pro.feature2: AI Party Coach as chat assistant

themes.title: Available Themes
themes.list: Pirates, Princess, Dinosaurs, Space, Soccer, Detective, Unicorn, Animals, Superheroes, Circus, Knights, Mermaid, Jungle, or No Theme

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, the basic plan is completely free. You can create up to 3 party plans. For advanced features, there is the Pro plan starting at 1.99 EUR/month.
faq.a2: We take data protection seriously. All data is transmitted and stored encrypted. Details can be found in our Privacy Policy.
faq.q3: Can I edit a plan later?
faq.a3: Yes, you can open and edit saved plans anytime from the dashboard.
faq.q4: What age group is Geburtstagspilot designed for?
faq.a4: Geburtstagspilot is optimized for children's birthday parties ages 3 to 12.
faq.a5: Yes, contact us at info@wamocon.com and we will delete your account and all associated data.
faq.q6: What happens if I cancel my Pro subscription?
faq.a6: After cancellation, you retain access until the end of the billing period. After that, you switch to the free plan.
